'''pahawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibisbill|ibisbill]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibisbill|ibisbill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pahawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæhæwæth|pæhæwæth]] || [[word:pæhæwæj|pæhæwæj]] || [[word:pæhæwæsh|pæhæwæsh]] || [[word:pæhæwæ|pæhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pahahawath|pahahawath]] || [[word:pahahawaj|pahahawaj]] || [[word:pahahawash|pahahawash]] || [[word:pahahawa|pahahawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pahawath|pahawath]] || [[word:pahawaj|pahawaj]] || [[word:pahawash|pahawash]] || [[word:pahawa|pahawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pahafwath|pahafwath]] || [[word:pahafwaj|pahafwaj]] || [[word:pahafwash|pahafwash]] || [[word:pahafwaf|pahafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pahawatha|pahawatha]] || [[word:pahawaja|pahawaja]] || [[word:pahawasha|pahawasha]] || [[word:pahawaka|pahawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pahawath|pahawath]] || [[word:pahawaj|pahawaj]] || [[word:pahawash|pahawash]] || [[word:pahawa|pahawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pahawathal|pahawathal]] || [[word:pahawajal|pahawajal]] || [[word:pahawashal|pahawashal]] || [[word:pahawakal|pahawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pahawathatha|pahawathatha]] || [[word:pahawajaja|pahawajaja]] || [[word:pahawashasha|pahawashasha]] || [[word:pahawaka|pahawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pahawathan|pahawathan]] || [[word:pahawajan|pahawajan]] || [[word:pahawashan|pahawashan]] || [[word:pahawakan|pahawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pahawathaoro|pahawathaoro]] || [[word:pahawajaoro|pahawajaoro]] || [[word:pahawashaoro|pahawashaoro]] || [[word:pahawakaoro|pahawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
